primary_sources.title: ROS registration; PAS founding congress Butterworth 1951
Liow, J. Piety and Politics — Islamism in Contemporary Malaysia (Oxford, 2009)

notes: Most ideologically coherent of major Malaysian parties. Governs Kelantan (continuously since 1990), Terengganu, Kedah; anchors PN coalition. GE15 (2022) largest single party (49 federal seats). Has attempted hudud legislation 7 times since 1993 (T4A issue 1619). Cohesion index reflects unusual leadership stability and doctrinal continuity.
